mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.`쉼표번호`, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, u.nickname FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.`쉼표번호` = u.`쉼표번호` WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status = 'visible' ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, `쉼표번호`, parent_id, content, status, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{쉼표번호}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.`쉼표번호`, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, u.nickname FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.`쉼표번호` = u.`쉼표번호` WHERE c.id = #{id}
